zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Ramsay於1350年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯奧特豪斯時，她的父親Malcolm Ramsay25歲，母親Lady Agathe Ogilvy21歲。她和Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1403年在她的家鄉享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant (the usual spelling in Scotland) of Ramsey . The Scottish Ramsays derive from Simund de Ramesie, recorded before 1175, who went to Scotland from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire).

variants.name: Ramsey
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish (Antrim): habitational name from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire, now part of Cambridgeshire), from Old English hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’. Alternatively, the name may also arise from Ramsey (Essex), probably from the same etymology as the Huntingdonshire placename. However, this is unlikely to be the source of the Scottish surname. This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, where it is probably in most if not all cases an altered form of Scottish Ramsay .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Ramsay was born in 1350, in Auchterhouse, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Malcolm Ramsay, was 25 and her mother, Lady Agathe Ogilvy, was 21. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar. She died in 1403, in her hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Ramsay est née en 1350, à Auchterhouse, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm Ramsay, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Agathe Ogilvy, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar. Elle est décédée en 1403, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Ramsay 1350 in Auchterhouse, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Malcolm Ramsay 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Agathe Ogilvy 21. Sie hatte mit Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1403 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Ramsay è nata il nel 1350 nel Auchterhouse, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Malcolm Ramsay, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Agathe Ogilvy, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar. Morì nel 1403, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Ramsayが1350年にイギリススコットランドアンガスアウチテローウゼで生まれた時，父Malcolm Ramsayは25歳，母Lady Agathe Ogilvyは21歳であった。彼女はSir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfarとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1403年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Ramsay(이)가 1350년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 오ch터하스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Malcolm Ramsay(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agathe Ogilvy(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Ramsay nasceu em 1350, em Auchterhouse, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcolm Ramsay, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agathe Ogilvy, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar. Ela faleceu em 1403, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Ramsay родилась в 1350 г. в местности аучтироус, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Malcolm Ramsay было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agathe Ogilvy, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar. Она умерла в 1403 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.
